name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-39
title: Spec invariant numbering already exhausted: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py has duplicated invariant logic
description: Spec lists 22 invariants. dispatch-tdd-subagent.py emits a 'SCOPE BOUNDARY RED FLAG' block (per Inv 18) and a 'SKILL.md ROUTING' block (per Inv 20). These are essentially repeated rule statements that already exist in the spec. The subagent has to learn them at prompt-time. Either: refactor the rule into a single source of truth (e.g., contract.md or a policy file the script reads), or accept that prompt assembly is the canonical materialisation — but then mark the spec invariants as 'redundant; rendered into prompt'. Currently any change to rule text needs editing TWO places (spec + prompt builder) which is exactly the drift Designed Deprecation tries to prevent.
